steps.title: Read the graph directions
steps.content: The parabola opens upward, so the coefficient of $x^2$ is positive. The line rises from left to right, so its slope is positive.

steps.title: Check the intersection
steps.content:
At the visible intersection $(4,7)$, both positive equations give the same value.
$$\frac{7}{16}(4)^2=7$$
$$\frac{7}{4}(4)=7$$
